{{Quote|Gorm was obnoxious, all right, but basically, I sensed, a harmless braggart.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Luke Skywalker: Detective">{{Tales|20|Luke Skywalker: Detective}}</ref>}}
'''Gorm Maldorf''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Azerbaz Region/Legends|Azerbaz Region]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. His [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] sidekick was [[Chester]]. A bully and a cheater, Maldorf was accidentally [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Chester when they were rigging [[the Cage]] for a race against [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].
